overall.description: A static elevated view of a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring towering glass skyscrapers, elevated highway interchanges, and flying vehicles against a dark overcast sky. The scene exhibits high-end game engine rendering with atmospheric haze and mixed artificial lighting from building windows and streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city center with elevated highways and high-rise towers

group of tall modern towers with illuminated windows rising against the dark sky
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses with moving vehicle lights
tall cranes silhouetted against the sky between buildings
high-rise building with regularly lit windows
tall thin structure with a glowing tip visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: A static aerial view captures a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera overlooks a complex interchange of elevated highways surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows. A large glowing billboard dominates the left side while construction cranes and a distant spire punctuate the skyline. Sparse traffic moves along the roads and a flying vehicle drifts across the dark overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static aerial perspective of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, capturing the dense intersection of futuristic infrastructure and towering architecture. It begins by overlooking a complex interchange of elevated highways, where sparse traffic flows beneath the glow of illuminated glass skyscrapers. As the eye wanders across the skyline, a large glowing billboard dominates the left side while construction cranes and a distant spire punctuate the dark horizon. The scene finally settles on the atmospheric expanse of the overcast sky, where a single flying vehicle drifts slowly across the hazy urban void.
